description_long: This is a modern smartwatch with a square, slightly rounded metallic case and a digital display. The watch face features a minimalist design with a stylized red and black mountain graphic and a digital time readout in white. The strap is a textured, taupe-colored fabric with visible stitching and multiple adjustment holes, secured by a simple buckle. On the right side of the case, there is a prominent circular crown with a red accent, likely used for navigation or interaction. The underside of the watch reveals a black sensor area, typical for heart rate or biometric monitoring, and a robust attachment for the strap. The overall design is sleek and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A sleek, square-faced smartwatch with a taupe fabric strap, digital display, and a prominent side crown. The design is minimalist and modern, with a mountain graphic on the screen.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display with a mountain graphic, time readout, and the full width of the taupe fabric strap.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the metallic case and the prominent circular crown with a red accent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black sensor area on the case back and the strap's attachment mechanism.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth metallic case profile and the curvature of the strap.
attribute_dial_design: Minimalist digital dial with a stylized red and black mountain graphic, white digital time display, and no visible numerals, indices, or subdials.
attribute_strap_type: Textured fabric strap with visible stitching and multiple adjustment holes, secured by a simple buckle.
attribute_watch_face_display: Digital display with a graphic background and numeric time readout; no analog hands or complications visible.
